title: UK Export Finance Country Heads and London Team - EECAN
body: "Team EECAN (London Office)  Co-Head, Global Origination   Emma Thomas      Email emma.thomas@ukexportfinance.gov.uk         Senior Business Origination Officer   Chris Allum      Email chris.allum@ukexportfinance.gov.uk         Business Origination Officer   Charlotte Kemp      Email charlotte.kemp@ukexportfinance.gov.uk         Country Heads (By Region)  Eastern Europe and Central Asia   Sebnem Alp   Based at the British Consulate General Istanbul Meşrutiyet Caddesi No 34 34435  IstanbulTurkey     Email sebnem.alp@fcdo.gov.uk         Deputy head:   Irem Kayhan   Based at the British Consulate General IstanbulMeşrutiyet Caddesi No 34 Tepebaşı Beyoglu 34435 IstanbulTurkey     Email irem.kayhan@fcdo.gov.uk         Central Asia  Deputy head:   Sevara Madgazieva   Based at the British Embassy Uzbekistan67 Gulyamov StreetTashkent10000Uzbekistan     Email sevara.madgazieva@fcdo.gov.uk        "
